title: Rewrite DepartmentView.tsx to fix critical data flow and component issues
job:
Rewrite plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/DepartmentView.tsx to fix critical issues.

Read the existing file and plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseList.tsx first.

Fixes needed:
1. Remove the inline PhaseList function — import PhaseList from ./PhaseList instead
2. Fix the phases useState — include the setter: const [phases, setPhases] = useState<Phase[]>([])
3. When a project is selected, populate phases (for now from local state, will be wired to store in persistence fix)
4. Use crypto.randomUUID() for project IDs instead of Date.now()
5. Wire the Add Phase button to create phases with proper IDs
6. Wire PhaseList onSelect, onAdd, onDelete, onReorder props
7. Add a selectedPhase state and render PhaseDetail when a phase is selected
8. Import PhaseDetail from ./PhaseDetail
9. Import ConversationRefs from ./ConversationRefs and render it in the project detail view for project-scoped refs
10. Add an activePhaseId selector — a dropdown or click action that sets the active phase on the project

Keep the overall structure (list mode vs detail mode) but fix the data flow.

Import types from ../../worker/types. Commit.
